name: storeforge
description: 电商平台开发插件，内置大厂电商开发经验和硬约束机制

skills.name: storeforge-using
skills.description: StoreForge 工作流入门，所有任务的起点

skills.name: storeforge-brainstorm
skills.description: 电商项目脑暴，分析需求并生成技术方案

skills.name: storeforge-writing-plans
skills.description: 将电商需求转化为实施计划

skills.name: storeforge-executing
skills.description: 执行实施计划，子代理 + TodoWrite + Git

skills.name: storeforge-verification
skills.description: 完成前验证，检查清单和覆盖率

skills.name: storeforge-review
skills.description: 多代理代码审查，5 个角度自循环 review

skills.name: storeforge-testing
skills.description: 三层测试体系：单元测试 + 集成测试 + E2E

skills.name: storeforge-domain-backend
skills.description: Golang + go-zero 硬约束和最佳实践

skills.name: storeforge-domain-admin
skills.description: Vue 3 + Element Plus 硬约束和最佳实践

skills.name: storeforge-domain-website
skills.description: Next.js + shadcn/ui 硬约束和最佳实践

skills.name: storeforge-domain-flutter
skills.description: Flutter 多端硬约束和最佳实践

skills.name: storeforge-harness
skills.description: Harness Engineering 核心机制，技术约束引擎

skills.name: storeforge-user-decision
skills.description: 用户决策流程，区分技术问题和产品问题
